name: USP消音版 | 铅管
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been given a custom engraved silencer and slide. You got what you wanted, now do you know what that means? – Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 这把武器附上了定制的消声器和滑套刻印。 你已经得到了你想要得到的东西，现在你想要知道那意味着什么吗？– 军火商布兹
